title: ros2docker config
description: Public configuration schema for ros2docker JSON-with-comments config files after comments are stripped.

image_name.description: Docker image tag used for build and run commands.

profile.description: Predefined image profile(s) to load as base configuration. A single profile name or an ordered list of add-on profiles applied left to right.

dockerfile.description: The Dockerfile resource filename to build.

tty.description: Allocate a Docker TTY for docker run. Defaults from run_type when omitted.

stdin_open.description: Keep STDIN open for docker run. Defaults from run_type when omitted.

mount_ws.description: Mount a config-adjacent ws directory into /ws.

enable_gui_forwarding.description: Forward the host X11 socket into the container.

forward_ssh_agent.description: Forward SSH_AUTH_SOCK into the container when available.

run_args.description: Docker run arguments normalized relative to the config file.

extra_run_args.description: Additional Docker run arguments appended after run_args.

bake_ros_packages.description: ROS package directories copied into the Docker build context.

catmux_file.description: Catmux session file used when run_type is catmux.

catmux_params.description: Catmux overwrite parameters passed as key=value pairs.

command.description: Command to execute when run_type is command.
